feed.title: SAP Community - Settlement Management
feed.subtitle: Settlement Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Error during Portugal Settlement Document Creation – Series Not Registered for Validation Code
entry.content:
System: SAP S/4HANA (Development)

Country: Portugal (PT)

Issue Description:
During the creation of settlement documents for Portugal with digital signature enabled, the system is preventing document posting with an error related to series validation.

Error Message:

Series LPXX is not registered for validation code; posting is not allowed.

Configuration Performed:
The following configurations have been completed:

  1. Number range maintained for Portugal using object GLO_PT_SET.
  2. Number ranges recorded for the digital signature of settlement documents.
  3. The same number range maintained under object W_LFAKTURA.
  4. Country/Region-specific number ranges defined by assigning the same internal number range to country PT.

Observed Behavior:
Despite completing the above configurations, the system throws the validation code error while creating the settlement document and does not allow posting.

Testing Status:
The issue is currently being tested in the development system. Once the issue is resolved and confirmed, the business will proceed with registering the series on the Portuguese Tax Authority portal.

Request:
Kindly advise if any additional configuration or prerequisite is required to resolve this error, or confirm whether series registration and validation code maintenance is mandatory even for development/testing environments.

Thanks and Regards,

Pankaj

entry.title: Field combination not visible when creating new line in business volume criteria
entry.content:
Hi Experts @Lakshmipathi  @GauthierVictor 

Please find the attached screensthots below.

I'm unable to see field combination 0006- customer hierarchy when i'm trying to create new line in the business volume selection criteria in condition contract, i have checked the set field combination and field combination for business volume selection and also specify settlement settings for condition contract types, this combination is present and this field combination is assigned contract type as well, but i'm not able to see this 0006 in standard ones 0S01/0S02 condition contract types and remaining few combinations are visible.

Request you to suggest the missing configuration please.

Settlement Management SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: WB2R111 error
entry.content:
Hello!

I'm running WB2R_SC, our aim is to make the final settlement with the date 31.12.2025

but  WB2R111 - "not all partial settlements could be distributed" error thrown.

Based on the line I’ve marked on the attached image, I’m wondering if the WB2R111 error might be caused by a manual settlement that was create on June.

I’ve noticed that other condition contracts which are currently experiencing the same error also contain manual entries. Could it be that these manual settlements are interfering with the system’s ability to correctly match business volume lines during final settlement?

I’ve checked and found the most suitable OSS note for this error - 3405475 

And I put breakpoint  in the method, mentioned in the OSS note and made debugging  while running  WB2R_SC transaction.  I see system found 1714 lines for partial settlement , however ALL  of their PRCTR values are empty.

by the way, we are using custom Bus. volume table ZSD_VBRKVBRP_6 with split criteria on Z field that's appended on structure KOMLFP. 

Based on the information I’ve provided, how can we run the report successfully and bypass the error?

thans in advance!

entry.title: Store EAN number at settlement document item level for reporting purpose
entry.content:
Hi experts @Lakshmipathi  @GauthierVictor 

We have a requirement to include EAN No. (18 Char) number against each line item in the settlement document. This EAN number comes from material determination setup.

Do we have any standard field where we can store this EAN no. so that we can use this EAN no. for report purpose and other purpose. I have seen a field supplier material number at item level (shown in the attached screenshot) can we use this field, i have tried to put some number in the field in manual rebate process to show you but we are using only automatic settlement only (WB2R_SC). Or do we have any other field we have to store this EAN number, Kindly suggest.

 

Settlement Management  SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Transfer event to be used for transferring the data from material determination to settlement doc it
entry.content:
Hi @Lakshmipathi 

We have a requirement to include EAN No. (18 Char) number against each line item in the settlement document. This EAN number comes from material determination setup.

1. Do we have any standard field where we can store this EAN no. so that we can use this EAN no. for report purpose and other purpose. I have seen a field supplier material number at item level (shown in the attached screenshot) can we use this field, i have tried to put some number in the field in manual rebate process to show you but we are using only automatic settlement only (WB2R_SC). Or do we have any other field we have to store this EAN number.

2. Also, Could you please share the transfer event to be used for transferring the data from material determination/Material master to settlement document item level in the transfer manager.

 

Settlement Management SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Royalties Settlement - Additional Business Volume Table Requirement Class
entry.content:
Dear Experts,
 
We are implementing Royalties Settlement within SAP Condition Contract Management (best practice scope item: 55I)
 
The business requirement is for royalty rebate business volume to reference Royalty Only Paid Invoices from SAP standard business volume table: V_WB2_VBRK_VBRP_4P and the delta accruals business volume to reference the sales order line-item net value of the rebate associated unpaid and paid billing documents. Both rebate and accruals will use the same business volume field selection which is material and utilise same value scales %. Also, the business volume determination will not be using Royalty Recipient partner data as a reference in the billing documents.
 
My proposed configuration approach for the accrual BVB determination:
  1. Create a new Business Volume table for sales order and item data or extend an existing CDS view of unpaid and paid billing docs to include the billed items' assigned sales order item value to capture the accruals business volume amount.
  2. Create a new condition type to capture the accruals' business volume and assign it to the Delta Accruals pricing procedure.
  3. Assign Amount Fields to the accrual BVB condition type and business fieldname in the detailed statement
  4. Set up a selection group and assign to relevant new BVB table.
 
My query is understanding what the Requirements Class is used for in the Business Volume Determination profile configuration. I noticed there is an SAP standard Requirement Class: CL_WB2_BVTAB_REQ_NO_LIFRO_DA that lists Without Royalties Recipient + Delta Accruals in its description, which seems fitting for this requirement. Therefore, for the above delta accrual business volume determination, should this requirement class be assigned in the Business Volume Determination Profile under the sub folder: Additional Business Volumes Tables config to the new sales order item business volume table? For further understanding, this particular requirements class is applicable for delta accrual business volume calculation only and therefore will not impact the royalty rebate business volume calculation?
 
Appreciate your feedback.
 
Many thanks,
Paul

entry.title: SAP/CCM - CCS USAGE = 5 Settlement condition with accruals
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
I need guidance on using CCS_USAGE 5 for RES1 custom rebates CCM.

Config:
- CCS_USAGE is enabled for RES1 condition type
- RES1 added to SD pricing procedure --> determined in order and billing
- Initially no FI posting for accruals amounts from billing --> enabled V/06 "Accruals" flag for RES1
- Maintained RES1 in CCM configuration to pass RES1 to RED2(delta accruals)

Testing:
- Accruals are posted from billing document
- Delta accruals calc correctly and posted to FI

Issue:
During settlement, RES1 is determined in the pricing with amounts but not contributing to "Net Value" and settlement document value shows ZERO(Root-cause likely due to "Accruals" flag in V/06).

Need your guidance and help on correct configuration and design to execute this scenario successfully.

entry.title: Settlement BAPI "BAPI_CONDITION_CONTRACT_DOC_IN" Overwriting Custom AP Reference Numbers(REF_DOC_NO)
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,
Facing a functional inconsistency where the settlement BAPI initially accepts the user-provided REF_DOC_NO value during validation but automatically overwrites it with the generated document number during the actual posting process for AP documents. 

This works fine for AR but not AP.

How can we preserve the user-defined reference number? Is there a BAdI or parameter we're missing?

Any help appreciated!

Below are the parameters passed for the AP Document,

Header data:

Item data:

entry.title: Standard Field does not appear in BAPICCBVB BAPI_CONDITION_CONTRACT_CHANGE
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am using CDS WCB_V_MKPF_MSEG as business volume table in Condition Contract processing. We're using standard field Movement Type (BWART) as Field Combination in Business Volume Selection Criteria. 

The issue is: those standard field in BV Selection criteria (i.e BWART) does not appear in structure BAPICCBVB  in BAPI_CONDITION_CONTRACT_CHANGE. I need to use those BAPI for mass change of Condition Contract.

Any idea if i missed any configuration to make sure standard field (such as BWART) appear in BAPICCBVB ?

Thank you 

Best Regards,

Hendry

entry.title: While executing WB2R_SV for a Sales commission contract it is giving pricing error in SAP S4 hana
entry.content:
Hi All

In the Sandbox SAP S4 hana 2023 on premise system while executing the WB2r_SV for external Sales commission contract I am getting the below error.

Sales commission contract:

Settlement procedure

and the below is SD pricing procedure for SO and Billing

Let me know if you need any further details.

Other Information: Created the sales order, delivery and invoice and External partner also is part of the sales order and invoice.

Successfully tested the Sales Rebate testing without any error with above SD pricing procedure and relevant Rebate Settlement pricing procedure. I don't think any issues with SD pricing procedure but not sure about the Sales commission settlement procedure.

Thanks

Sri

entry.title: Invoice and item numbers on settlement document flexible overview
entry.content:
Hello CCM Experts,

Need your advice on this requirement. The requirement is to show the invoice and line item numbers on the customer settlement document(flexible overview), but currently all the related details but not the invoice and line item numbers.

Currently i have a split criteria in business volume profile to create one customer settlement document with individual invoice representing as line item within the document(its working as expected). But why system is not capturing   invoice and line item numbers, do  i need to use transfer manager and if so which transfer group i need to use.

entry.title: SAP Settlement Management – Retrieve PDF Form via API for Lobster Integration (XInvoice/ZUGFeRD)
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I'm facing an integration challenge in the area of SAP Settlement Management (Condition Contract Management) and hope someone has had similar experiences or can point me in the right direction.

Background:

My customer uses Lobster as their EDI/middleware solution. For standard billing, the integration is already working: Lobster retrieves the invoice PDF via the standard OData API:

 
 
GET /sap/opu/odata/SAP/API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV/GetPDF

This works smoothly and is well documented.

The Problem:

Now we need to build an analogous process for the Customer Rebate Document from Settlement Management – i.e., the document issued to the customer during bonus settlement (Customer Rebate Settlement Document / credit memo equivalent).

The goal is to also retrieve this form via an interface and pass it to Lobster, so it can be further processed and sent as an XInvoice (XRechnung) or ZUGFeRD-compliant electronic invoice.

My Research So Far:

I have searched extensively but have not found a comparable standard API:

  • On the SAP API Business Hub (api.sap.com), there does not appear to be a dedicated OData API for Settlement Management forms / Condition Contract documents
  • API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV only covers classic SD billing documents, not Settlement Management documents
  • I am not aware of any RFC-enabled function modules that cover this use case

My Questions for the Community:

  1. Is there a (perhaps lesser-known) OData or REST API in the SAP standard that allows programmatic retrieval of a Settlement Management form PDF?
  2. Would an RFC/BAPI approach be feasible?
  3. Are there alternative integration approaches, such as:
    • Direct integration via SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) / Integration Suite?
    • Output via SPAD/Spool with subsequent retrieval via web service?
    • Using Smart Forms / Adobe Forms Output Management with a downstream retrieval step?
  4. Has anyone successfully implemented this process – rebate settlement document → middleware → XInvoice/ZUGFeRD delivery – and can share their approach?

System Environment: SAP S/4HANA (On-Premise), Lobster as middleware, target format XRechnung / ZUGFeRD 2.x

Any hint is appreciated – even a confirmed "this is not possible in standard" would already be helpful and move us forward. Thanks in advance!

Best regards

entry.title: how we can Post the business volume for the internal order in Non Trade settlement process
entry.content:
Hi All, I am new to CCS and want to undertsand how we can Post the business volume for the internal order in Non Trade settlement process. 

Can anyone help with the process along with the transactions that we have to try a do the postings/create business volume. 

Thanks In Adv!

entry.title: Struggeling with Basis in CCM
entry.content:
Hello, 

we are using CCM for Commission and Rebate Handling.

In our pricing Procedure we have our own Basis which is reduced with the Rebate amount in case there is a Rebate Contract.

So it's looking more or less like that:

PR00                                      700 EUR

Net value                               700 EUR

Rebate Accruals                   100 EUR

BASIS for commission        600 EUR

This is working, when the Rebate Contract has been created before we create the billing document. We had the case several times now that the Rebate Contract has been created after the billing document. The effect is that the Basis for the Commission is then to high. In our example it would 700.  

The basis for commission should be deducted afterwards as the old VBOF run did it.

Maybe somebody has already head the issue and solved it? 

Thanks in advance

kind regards

Martina

entry.title: Business Volume Report and Settlement are not in sync
entry.content:
Hello,

we are using Commission type "paid invoices".  We had a billing document which is raised in January but paid in the mid of February. 

The first settlement run was done at the End of January so this invoice was unpaid at this time. The Billing Document appeared with 0 value in the this Settlement document. That's correct. 

In the Settlement document for February the Billing Document appeared again but with the correct value. 

When we are looking in the Business Volume Report the billing document is shown with value for January.  So to create a preview for the receivers is difficult for our users.  Is there something wrong in the customizing or is this the standard behavior?

Thanks in advance and

best regards

Martina

entry.title: Business maintain condition contract BUT do not want Settlement process,
entry.content:
Hi All

Business wants to go for Settlement management ( Sales commission Condition Contract)  but they do not want to use the Settlement process. They want to use the existing settlement process.

They want to use the condition contract to only maintain the Rebate conditions and flow them into sales order and billing document. 

Just trying to understand whether this can be achieved without any issues.. Not sure what are the challenges from the settlement documents outstanding for the business volume generated.

What settings needs to be done in settlement document type so it will not show any type of outstanding.. 

thanks

Sri

entry.title: ENSARCO (Italy) for External Sales Commissions in Settlement Management
entry.content:
Hi there!

We would like to create external sales commission contracts for Italian commission recipients.  To create a contract in Settelment Management is not the problem.  But I don´t know how to handle ENSARCO requirements. I have found a tipp to solve it with Withholding Tax. But this was for Public Cloud.  Can anybody tell me how to solve this with SAP Version 2021. 

Thanks a lot

Judith

entry.title: Using BVB_LIST for pricing Condition Contract
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I am working to add the BVB_LIST field into the pricing KOMP for using it not just as BV but to assign rates based on RefCC. And I am checking the Transfer Rules (23) and they are not very useful as it is not clear the Source Structure and to fill up KOMP not clear the BAPI to be used and what code to apply. Any support on that?

Tags: Settlement Management // Condition Contract Mgt // BVB_LIST (Material List) 

All the best

entry.title: CCM: Custom field in pricing table
entry.content:
Hi CCM Experts,

I need some technical inputs from you. We would to add custom product hierarchy fields in pricing table of CCM. We have added these fields in KOMP structure and created tables adding these custom fields and used in access sequence, after doing this whenever we trying open WCOCO t.code we are getting  the error saying " zz_prodh5 of table 936 is not support" and not allowing to move forward. We have removed the access sequence with these fields for now. Could you please share how and where to add custom field for pricing table for CCM usage. We would like to apply price putting this custom field in one of the key combinations of customer condition contract. Attaching the error screenshot for reference.

Kindly share your valuable inputs.

Settlement Management SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition Sales
